id: 路遥知马力，日久见人心
sourceText: 路遥知马力，日久见人心
title: 路遥知马力，日久见人心
meaning: 真正的朋友和好的品质，需要长时间的相处和困难时刻的考验才能看出来。

scenes.title: 快乐的新朋友
scenes.description: 刺猬辉辉在幼儿园里遇到了新同学小松鼠。他们一起搭积木，笑得非常开心。辉辉觉得小松鼠是个很棒的朋友。
scenes.prompt: A cute little hedgehog named 'Hui Hui' with soft brown spines and big round glasses, wearing a red scarf. He is small, friendly, and expressive., A cute hedgehog wearing a red scarf and glasses playing block towers with a fluffy squirrel in a bright kindergarten classroom. Sunlight streams through the window. Warm, happy expression., Medium shot, eye-level, focus on the interaction between the two characters and the colorful blocks., Warm watercolor illustration style, soft pastel colors, gentle lighting, cozy atmosphere, suitable for children aged 3-8.
scenes.compositionHint: Medium shot, eye-level, focus on the interaction between the two characters and the colorful blocks.
scenes.narration:
新朋友，真好玩，
一起搭塔笑开颜。
可是，好玩只是开始，
真心还要慢慢看。

scenes.title: 下雨天的约定
scenes.description: 第二天放学时突然下起了大雨。小松鼠撑着一把漂亮的伞跑远了，没有回头叫上没带伞的辉辉。辉辉有点失落，但自己跑回了家。
scenes.prompt: A cute little hedgehog named 'Hui Hui' with soft brown spines and big round glasses, wearing a red scarf. He is small, friendly, and expressive., Rainy day at the school gate. A squirrel runs away with a colorful umbrella, leaving the hedgehog behind without an umbrella. The hedgehog looks slightly sad but determined. Wet pavement, grey sky., Wide shot showing the separation, emphasizing the distance between the two characters and the rain environment., Warm watercolor illustration style, soft pastel colors, gentle lighting, cozy atmosphere, suitable for children aged 3-8.
scenes.compositionHint: Wide shot showing the separation, emphasizing the distance between the two characters and the rain environment.
scenes.narration:
雨哗哗，天变冷，
伞儿跑，不见影。
第一次，有点难过，
是不是朋友？再想想。

scenes.title: 摔倒的膝盖
scenes.description: 过了一周，辉辉在公园跑步时不小心摔倒了，膝盖擦破了皮，疼得哭了起来。周围的小朋友都惊呆了。这时，小松鼠跑过来，拿出创可贴，轻轻帮辉辉包扎，还陪他坐在长椅上休息。
scenes.prompt: A cute little hedgehog named 'Hui Hui' with soft brown spines and big round glasses, wearing a red scarf. He is small, friendly, and expressive., Autumn park scene. The hedgehog holds a large red apple. The squirrel offers half of its pinecone. They are sitting together on a bench, smiling and eating. Golden autumn leaves falling around them., Over-the-shoulder shot or side profile showing the exchange, warm golden tones, focusing on generosity., Warm watercolor illustration style, soft pastel colors, gentle lighting, cozy atmosphere, suitable for children aged 3-8.
scenes.compositionHint: Close-up on the comforting gesture, highlighting the care and empathy in the squirrel's face.
scenes.narration:
摔一跤，痛得哭，
谁在身边扶一扶？
不是看谁玩得好，
是看谁肯帮忙。

scenes.title: 分享的苹果
scenes.description: 又过了很久，秋天到了。辉辉带了一个大大的红苹果来分享。小松鼠拿出自己最心爱的松果，换给了辉辉一半。他们互相交换食物，吃得很香。这种分享不是暂时的，而是持续的。
scenes.prompt: A cute little hedgehog named 'Hui Hui' with soft brown spines and big round glasses, wearing a red scarf. He is small, friendly, and expressive., Spring garden. The hedgehog and the squirrel are walking hand-in-hand (or paw-in-paw) among blooming flowers. Bright, fresh green colors. Both look happy and secure. Time passing imagery like a sun dial or calendar subtly in background., Full body shot, moving forward together, symbolizing the journey of friendship over time., Warm watercolor illustration style, soft pastel colors, gentle lighting, cozy atmosphere, suitable for children aged 3-8.
scenes.compositionHint: Over-the-shoulder shot or side profile showing the exchange, warm golden tones, focusing on generosity.
scenes.narration:
分苹果，换松果，
分享甜蜜不嫌多。
日子长，情义深，
真心朋友暖心窝。

scenes.title: 时间告诉我们要什么
scenes.description: 春天来了，辉辉和小松鼠成了最好的朋友。他们一起经历了雨天和摔倒。辉辉明白了，虽然刚认识时很开心，但只有经过很长时间，遇到困难时互相帮助，才知道谁是真正的好朋友。
scenes.prompt: A cute little hedgehog named 'Hui Hui' with soft brown spines and big round glasses, wearing a red scarf. He is small, friendly, and expressive., Spring garden. The hedgehog and the squirrel are walking hand-in-hand (or paw-in-paw) among blooming flowers. Bright, fresh green colors. Both look happy and secure. Time passing imagery like a sun dial or calendar subtly in background., Full body shot, moving forward together, symbolizing the journey of friendship over time., Warm watercolor illustration style, soft pastel colors, gentle lighting, cozy atmosphere, suitable for children aged 3-8.
scenes.compositionHint: Full body shot, moving forward together, symbolizing the journey of friendship over time.
scenes.narration:
春花开，秋叶落，
时间像个小侦探。
跑得远，看得清，
日久见心最真诚。
